intro: A federal judge has approved Anthropic's $1.5 billion settlement with authors over copyright claims related to Claude's training data, with only 350 authors opting out of the agreement. Indonesia faces pressure to balance US and Chinese interests as it weighs joining a new AI body, risking potential restrictions on access to American AI models and technology. Google released three new Gemini models—Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber—though the absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro continues to raise questions about the company's AI strategy.
